title: The Production AI Playbook: Deploying Agents at Enterprise Scale — Sandipan Bhaumik, Databricks
summary: Sandipan Bhaumik presents five pillars for production AI systems: evaluation (define success numerically), observability (trace every agent decision), data foundation (handle data quality), multi-agent orchestration, and governance (catch PII breaches). The framework emerged from a retail bank engagement where six weeks of infrastructure setup preceded model selection, and tracing detected stale knowledge after a policy update caused customer satisfaction to drop.
writeup: This talk lays out five pillars for moving AI agents into enterprise production: evaluation that defines success numerically, observability that traces every agent decision, a data foundation that handles data quality, multi-agent orchestration, and governance that catches PII breaches. The framework comes from a retail bank engagement where six weeks of infrastructure setup came before model selection, and where tracing surfaced stale knowledge after a policy update had driven customer satisfaction down. The emphasis falls on the operational scaffolding around models rather than the model choice itself.
